rationale: Approved ADC; classical surface receptor with large ECD
Approved CAR-T + ADC; classical B-cell surface marker
Approved Mirvetuximab (ELAHERE); GPI-anchored on outer leaflet
TROP-2-adjacent validated tumor antigen; large mucin ECD; multiple antibody programs
Invariant chain on B/dendritic cell surface; clinical-stage Milatuzumab ADC

Primarily melanosomal (lysosome-related organelle); pMHC presentation is the dominant accessibility mechanism (Tebentafusp targets gp100 peptide-MHC, not PMEL on the surface). Borderline like other pMHC cases.
Apical phosphate transporter; clinical Lifastuzumab vedotin ADC
Mesenchymal/stromal surface receptor; clinical-stage ABBV-085 ADC
HLA-B7-restricted CTL peptide; protein not directly accessible but its peptide is pMHC-presented
HLA-A*02-restricted cancer-testis antigen (NY-ESO-1); clinical TCR-T programs
HLA-A*02-restricted; clinical T-cell engagers (brenetafusp/IMC-F106C)
ER-resident at baseline; reaches outer leaflet during immunogenic cell death
Cytoplasmic at baseline; tumor-stress-induced surface presentation
ER chaperone at baseline; ER-stress/oncogenic-state translocation to outer leaflet
Membrane-anchored on the cytoplasmic face; tests "membrane = surface" trap

Classical lysosomal membrane glycoprotein; reaches plasma membrane via lysosomal exocytosis (CD107a degranulation marker on NK / cytotoxic T cells, surface staining on metastatic tumor cells). Conditional surfacing puts it in the maybe class.
Polytopic TM but lysosomal; TM topology does not imply PM accessibility
Fully secreted gel-forming mucin; no membrane tether
Imaged-confirmed signaling endosome; M1 false positive
Cycles between Golgi/endosomes/autophagosomal precursors; multi-pass TM but never PM in steady state
TGN46 — **cycles continuously between TGN and PM** via the secretory recycling pathway; canonical marker for the TGN-PM trafficking cycle. Transient but routine surface presence.
ER signaling adaptor (TMEM173); TM-rich but never on PM
Peripheral on Golgi cytosolic face; tests inner-leaflet/cytosolic-Golgi confusion
TCR-T + bispecific: GSK4427296 TCR-T + AMG509 bispecific. 6-pass TM with small ECLs — also tests minimal_ectoloops case
clinical ADC: Multiple programs; secreted+membrane prostate antigen
CAR-T + ADC + bispecific: BNT211 CAR-T (BioNTech), AMG794 bispecific, multiple ADCs. Tight-junction claudin
approved bispecific + CAR-T: Talquetamab approved 2023 (multiple myeloma); orphan GPCR
approved bispecific + ADC: M9140 ADC; multiple approved/clinical programs
clinical CAR-T + ADC: Multiple PSCA programs; GPI-anchored
clinical ADC: ABBV-011 ADC (AbbVie SCLC)
clinical mAb: Vantictumab (OMP-18R5, Ipsen/OncoMed); 7TM Wnt receptor
clinical ADC: Multiple Wnt-receptor ADC programs
clinical ADC: PF-06647263 ADC
clinical mAb: Anti-EREG programs (epiregulin)
approved TKI + clinical ADC: Crizotinib/lorlatinib approved (small molecule); ADC programs in development
approved bispecific: Tarlatamab/Imdelltra approved 2024 SCLC
clinical CAR-T + ADC: Cirmtuzumab, Zilovertamab vedotin, Lyell CAR-T

clinical mAb: Soluble EphB4 fusion programs

clinical ADC: Multiple GFRalpha-1 ADC programs
clinical ADC: Glembatumumab vedotin (Celldex)

clinical peptide drug: Multiple glucagon receptor programs
approved small molecule: Lorcaserin (was approved); 7TM serotonin receptor
approved peptide: Afamelanotide (Scenesse) approved; melanocortin
clinical small molecule: Bile acid receptor TGR5; multiple programs
clinical small molecule: Bradykinin B1 receptor; multiple programs

clinical small molecule: Neuropeptide Y receptor 5; obesity programs
clinical small molecule: Metabotropic glutamate receptor 4; CNS programs
clinical small molecule: Vasopressin V1A receptor; conivaptan family

Proto-oncogene tyrosine kinase; canonically myristoylated/palmitoylated to inner leaflet (cytoplasmic face). Ecto-SRC has been reported on cancer cell surfaces (melanoma, other tumors) — borderline conditional/pathological surfacing. M1 votes 3/6.
Rho GTPase; geranylgeranylated to inner leaflet. Cytoplasmic signaling.
Heterotrimeric G-alpha-q; lipidated cytoplasmic-side anchor.
G-protein beta-1 subunit; peripheral on inner leaflet via Gγ prenylation.

Src-family tyrosine kinase; canonically inner-leaflet myristoylated/palmitoylated. **Cell-surface LYN reported on B cells and in some cancer contexts**, parallel to ecto-SRC. Borderline pathological surfacing.
Hematopoietic cell kinase (Src family); inner-leaflet lipid-anchored.
Ras GTPase; lipidated inner leaflet (same family as KRAS in benchmark).
Rac1 GTPase; geranylgeranylated to inner leaflet.
Ribophorin 1; ER membrane subunit of OST glycosylation complex.
Ribophorin 2; ER membrane subunit of OST.
SREBP cleavage-activating protein; ER cholesterol sensor.
IP3 receptor type 3; ER membrane calcium channel.
IP3 receptor type 1; ER membrane calcium channel.
Sec61 translocon γ subunit; ER protein-translocation channel.

β-1,4-galactosyltransferase 1; primarily Golgi-resident, but **a cell-surface form on sperm mediates zona pellucida adhesion**; also reported on tumor cells. Conditional/cell-type-restricted surfacing.
TMED9 cargo receptor; **cycles ER↔Golgi↔PM** in the secretory pathway with transient PM presence. Cargo-cycling proteins reach the outer face routinely.
TMED10 cargo receptor; same ER↔Golgi↔PM cycling pattern as TMED9. Transient PM presence in the secretory pathway.
N-acetylgalactosaminyltransferase 1; Golgi glycosyltransferase.
Nuclear pore complex transmembrane component; nuclear envelope.
SUN domain protein 1; inner nuclear membrane (LINC complex).
SUN domain protein 2; inner nuclear membrane.
Nesprin-1; outer nuclear membrane (LINC complex), cytoskeleton-coupled.
Nesprin-2; outer nuclear membrane.

Mitochondrial outer-membrane porin; **plasma-membrane VDAC1 (pl-VDAC) is well-documented** in B cells, neurons, sperm, cancer cells, erythrocytes. Anti-VDAC1 antibodies in development. Borderline due to dual-localization.

Pro-apoptotic Bcl-2 family; canonically translocates to mitochondrial outer membrane during apoptosis. **Surface BAX has been reported as an apoptotic-cell marker** (parallel to CALR's ICD-induced surface translocation).

TGF-β1 secreted as latent complex; **GARP/LRRC32-tethered to Treg surface** as latent TGF-β; integrin αvβ6/αvβ8-mediated activation extracellularly. Clinical anti-GARP-TGF-β programs (Treg targeting).

Complement C3 secreted plasma protein; cleavage fragment **C3b is covalently deposited on cell surfaces during opsonization**. Borderline because C3 itself is soluble but its activation product is surface-anchored.
Transferrin; secreted iron-transport plasma protein.
Interleukin-6; secreted cytokine.
Insulin-like growth factor 1; secreted hormone.

Prothrombin secreted coagulation zymogen. Recruits to activated-platelet surfaces during prothrombinase-complex assembly via Gla-domain binding to phosphatidylserine, but **the protein has no membrane anchor of its own** — surface association is via binding, not membrane insertion. Recruitment ≠ surface accessibility.

Fibronectin secreted ECM glycoprotein. Forms cell-surface fibronectin matrix via integrin α5β1 binding (recruitment), and EDB-fibronectin antibodies target tumor-stromal fibronectin, but **the protein has no membrane anchor of its own** — it's a soluble protein that binds surface receptors. Recruitment ≠ surface accessibility.
Apolipoprotein B-100; secreted on lipoprotein particles.
Vascular endothelial growth factor A; secreted angiogenic factor.
α2-macroglobulin; secreted plasma protease inhibitor.
JAK3 tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic (associates with γc of cytokine receptors). Tofacitinib target.
Spleen tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic. Fostamatinib target.
B-Raf serine/threonine kinase; cytoplasmic. **Vemurafenib/dabrafenib approved**. Tests "approved drug ⇒ surface" trap.
Bruton's tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic. **Ibrutinib approved**.
JAK1 tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic. Multiple approved JAK inhibitors.
JAK2 tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic. **Ruxolitinib approved** (myelofibrosis).
TYK2 tyrosine kinase; cytoplasmic. Deucravacitinib approved (psoriasis).
AKT2 serine/threonine kinase; cytoplasmic. Capivasertib clinical/approved.
MEK1 kinase; cytoplasmic. **Cobimetinib/trametinib approved**.
MEK2 kinase; cytoplasmic.

Histone deacetylase 6; cytoplasmic/perinuclear with no membrane anchor. 'Extracellular HDAC6' reports are mostly vesicular cargo (in EVs, not cell-surface accessible) or recruitment-style binding. **No own membrane anchor** — recruitment ≠ surface accessibility. Multiple clinical small-molecule inhibitors target the intracellular catalytic pocket.
IKK-β; cytoplasmic. Multiple clinical NF-κB-pathway programs.
LRRK2 kinase; cytoplasmic/peripheral. **Parkinson's clinical programs**.
ER calcium sensor; canonically ER-resident, but **clusters at ER-PM junctions during store-operated calcium entry (SOCE)**; some PM staining reports. Borderline due to ER-PM junction localization.

Transferrin receptor 1 (CD71); classical iron-uptake receptor; **multiple clinical antibody programs** (CX-2029 EpCAM-conditional ADC, TROP-2/TFRC dual-targeting), plus the standard transferrin-conjugate brain-shuttle approaches. Type II single-pass TM with large ECD. Missed by SURFY and HPA despite being a canonical surface receptor.
